components.content: Run the CLI application with error handling. Catches RaiseError exceptions and displays them with proper formatting,
Base exception for all raise-cli errors. All raise-cli exceptions inherit from this class, providing:
Configuration-related errors. Raised when:
Kata definition not found. Raised when a requested kata ID does not exist in .raise/katas/.
Gate definition not found. Raised when a requested gate ID does not exist in .raise/gates/.
Artifact file not found. Raised when a referenced artifact path does not exist.
External dependency not available. Raised when a required external tool is not installed or accessible:
State file corrupted or invalid. Raised when:
Schema or artifact validation failed. Raised when:
Gate validation did not pass. Raised when one or more required gate criteria fail.

Custom settings source for TOML configuration files.
Get the XDG data directory for raise-cli. Returns the directory where user data files should be stored.
Configuration settings for raise-cli with proper cascade precedence.
